summary: Reframed the opening around Lena's shelf work so it no longer repeats chapter 12's timed rain-entry scaffold, and nudged the closing records beat toward eleven to smooth the handoff into the next chapter's late-night June scene.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to start from Lena scraping price stickers instead of a matching 'By [time] ... rain ...' construction.
Adjusted the final paragraph's time cue so the chapter exits closer to eleven before the next chapter's return to June.
